title: ChangeAlertsRecipe
description:
CCDC-based per-pixel change alerts. Compares recent observations to a CCDC harmonic-regression reference; flags pixels where residuals exceed σ over a confirmation window.

Pipeline: load `reference` (CCDC recipe/asset) → build observation collection from `sources` over calibration + monitoring windows ending at `date.monitoringEnd` → per pixel, residuals vs CCDC model → flag where residuals > `minConfidence` σ across `numberOfObservations` consecutive scenes.

**LLM must set:** `reference.{type, id}` (which CCDC to monitor — no default), `sources.dataSets` (monitoring source). `date.monitoringEnd` defaults to today.

options.title: ChangeAlertsOptions
options.description: Same shape as `TIME_SERIES.options`. See that schema for per-field semantics.

reference.title: ChangeAlertsReference
reference.description: SEPAL CCDC recipe or EE asset id of a CCDC export.

date.title: ChangeAlertsDate
date.description: Calibration: [monitoringEnd − monitoringDuration − calibrationDuration, monitoringEnd − monitoringDuration). Monitoring: [that, monitoringEnd).

monitoringEnd.description: End of monitoring window. Default = today.

cloudPercentageThreshold.description: Drop scenes above this scene-level cloud %. Default 75.

minConfidence.description: Min residual magnitude (σ) to count as change. Default 5. Higher = more conservative, fewer false alarms.

minNumberOfChanges.description: Min qualifying obs to confirm alert. Default 3.

mustBeConfirmedInMonitoring.description: Require confirmation within monitoring window. Default true.

mustBeStableBeforeChange.description: Require stable calibration window before flagging. Default true.

mustStayChanged.description: Require change persists (not reverts). Default true.
